name: bet
invariants: output.ok === true || typeof output.reason === 'string' || typeof output.error === 'string'
_note: Place a SPARKS wager on an open market. Actor-gated (no_actor without ctx.actor). Delegates to betting-markets.placeBet: escrows the stake from sparks_balances, persists a market_positions row, bumps the pool. Poisoned numeric stakes fail-CLOSE (invalid_stakeSparks) BEFORE any escrow; a non-existent market yields market_not_found.
